answer:
43.2 minutes.

Math: 30 days = 43,200 min. 0.1% allowed down = 43.2 min/month.

Nearby tiers, for comparison:
- 99.95% → 21.6 min
- 99.99% → 4.3 min
- 99.5% → 216 min

Caveats that change SLA drafting: define "downtime" (full outage vs. degraded?), measurement method, exclusions (planned maintenance, force majeure), and whether credits kick in per-minute or per-breach. Also decide calendar month vs. fixed 30 days — 31-day month at 99.9% allows 44.6 min.
